ajah.black_desc: Wielders of forbidden shadow magic, masters of dark and destructive forces.
ajah.green_desc: Wielders of wild nature magic, calling upon the living strength of the earth.
ajah.red_desc: Wielders of raging fire magic, channeling the destructive fury of flame.
ajah.white_desc: Wielders of frozen ice magic, freezing and shattering their enemies.

class.assassin_desc: A stealthy and agile fighter, utilizing shadows and precision strikes.
class.druid_desc: A guardian of nature, fights with magic and a loyal companion.
class.mage_desc: A scholar of arcane mysteries, wielding powerful spells.
class.warrior_desc: A master of arms and armor, relying on physical strength and battlefield tactics.
effect.beastfrenzy: Beast Frenzy: {attack_pct}% pet attack and {attack_speed_pct}% pet attack speed for {duration}s
effect.bleed: Bleed: {damage_pct}% basic attack damage as damage over time
effect.blind: Blind: {miss_pct}% chance to miss basic attacks for {duration}s
effect.clearcasting: Clearcasting: {reduction_pct}% mana costs of abilities for {duration}s
effect.cleave: Cleave: Deals {damage_pct}% damage to second target for {duration}s
effect.echostruck: Echo Struck: {reset_pct}% chance to reset all cooldowns on hit
effect.lifesteal: Lifesteal: Restores {percentage}% of damage dealt as health for {duration}s
effect.statboost: Stat Boost: Temporarily increases {stat} by {amount} for {duration}s
effect.monarchshield: Monarch Shield: Total invulnerability for {duration}s. Cannot cast nor attack during this time.
effect.soullink: Soul Link: Redirects {damage_transfer_pct}% of damage to pet for {duration}s
effect.taunt: Taunt: Forces enemies to attack pet for {duration}s
effect.thorns: Thorns: Reflects {damage_reflected_pct}% of incoming damage as physical damage for {duration}s
effect.vulnerability: Vulnerability: Amplifies incoming damage on the target by {damage_pct}% for {duration}s
general.active_points_desc: Active Points represent an increasing measure of progress. They never reset.
general.xp_desc: XP increases your level. Gain more XP from Hunt, Quest, and Duel.
general.ability_pool_exhausted: Ability pool exhausted! +5 Max Mana instead.
general.perk_pool_exhausted: Perk pool exhausted! +5 Max HP instead.
general.hunt_no_loot: The hunt found no loot this time.
general.hunt_combat_triggered: Combat encountered! Prepare before the fight.
general.errand_desc: Run a small errand for a local, with limited risks and rewards.
general.expedition_desc: Explore a nearby location, with moderate risks but a chance on greater rewards.
general.odyssey_desc: Embark on a grand adventure, packed with danger, but rich with rewards and priceless loot.
general.precombat_desc: Adjust equipment and choose up to 5 abilities and 5 consumables for this fight.
general.craft_desc: Craft a piece of equipment suitable for your level.
general.duel_desc: Challenge an opponent to a duel.
general.gold_desc: Gold is used to buy equipment and consumables.
general.name: Name
general.quest_desc: Embark on an adventure to earn gold and find new equipment.
general.rest_desc: Rest to recover health and mana. Options range from simple rest to grand accommodation.
general.rough_rest_desc: Recover between 40-{max_pct}% max health and mana.
general.grand_accommodation_desc: Fully recover health and mana. Permanently increase max health and mana by {min_bonus}-{max_bonus}.
general.study_desc: Study tomes and scrolls. Scales with Intelligence.
general.toast_train_nothing_new: Trained hard, but learned nothing new.
general.train_desc: Train hard to increase a random attribute.
modal.sell_item_text: Are you sure you want to sell this item?
modal.remove_perk_text: Are you sure you want to remove this perk?
perk.stone_barrier_passive_of_the_sea: Stone Barrier Passive Of The Sea
pet.bat_desc: A nocturnal creature that disorients foes with its erratic movements.
pet.bear_desc: A massive and powerful guardian, shielding its allies with immense strength.
pet.crocodile_desc: An armored river predator with a bone-crushing bite and unrelenting patience.
pet.eagle_desc: A majestic and sharp-eyed raptor, soaring high to strike from above.
pet.griffin_desc: A majestic beast with the body of a lion and wings of an eagle, ruling both earth and sky.
pet.hyena_desc: A cunning scavenger that laughs in the face of danger and overwhelms prey in packs.
pet.hell_hound_desc: A demonic creature born of fire and shadow, burning anything it touches.
pet.lizard_desc: A quick and cold-blooded companion that blends into its surroundings with ease.
pet.manticore_desc: A terrifying legendary beast with a lion's body, bat wings, and a venomous scorpion tail.
pet.pegasus_desc: A legendary winged horse that carries its master across any battlefield.
pet.puma_desc: A sleek and silent mountain stalker, pouncing on its prey with lightning reflexes.
pet.rat_desc: A scrappy and resourceful rodent, nimble enough to slip past any defence.
pet.snake_desc: A venomous and elusive hunter, striking silently from the shadows.
pet.spider_desc: A patient predator that ensnares enemies in its web before closing in for the kill.
pet.three_headed_dog_desc: A fearsome guardian of the underworld with three ferocious heads.
pet.tiger_desc: A fearless apex predator of immense speed and devastating strikeforce.
pet.unicorn_desc: A pure and magical creature whose horn channels powerful healing energy.
pet.vulture_desc: A grim carrion bird that circles overhead, striking when prey is at its weakest.
pet.wolf_desc: A loyal and swift predator, hunting in perfect harmony with its master.
race.dwarf_desc: Sturdy and resilient dwellers of the deep mountains, master craftsmen and warriors.
race.elf_desc: Graceful and wise guardians of the ancient forests, skilled in magic and archery.
race.human_desc: Versatile and ambitious builders of empires, adaptable to any path they choose.
race.orc_desc: Fierce and powerful warriors of the wild wastes, valuing strength and honor in battle.
